TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ta-ka ťĀĒŚć° == Ta-kay " Mun-cya-la-kamu: ŗ¶Ęŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ", u tukay nu Mun-cya-la, Ta-ka niyadu'an u tada tukay. itida ku eneng nu Ta-ka i Hen-he-san-cyw-cuo Pu-li-kan-cya sa'wac nu amisan, u satabakiay nu Mun-cya-la a tukay, u Nan-ya macimacian, tademaw nu macimacian makaala tu caytusepsep nu pinaay a tademawan. idaw ku kasiidaan nu likisi, pangangan han u "cin-cen-se' tukay" masabinacadan ku nitenunan a tuudan nu kasinganganan. ťĀĒŚć° , . malumanay nu Ta-ka u Cya-han-ci-e-na-cya-e " Mun-cya-la-kamu : ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶ôŗßćŗ¶óŗßÄŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗ¶óŗ¶į, caynemsepwal mihcaan u Muo-wuo-e-ti-kuo Mun-cya-la niyadu'an a cung-tu ci Su-pei-ta. Yi-se-lan-han patideng, itida i sabaw tu pitu a seci u katakid a Mu-se-lin tatelungan nu sasiwbayan.sisa, Ta-ka aydaay a nipatidengan tatengaay i sabaw tu siwa a secian nu Ing-kuo kabulawan a zitayan, tada mikilul tu Cya-e-ke'-ta a Mun-cya-la sakatusa a tukayan. caysiwsippic mihcaan In-pa nikakenisan satu, Ta-ka mala Tung-pa-ci-se-tan a tada kanatalan, itida i caysiwpictu mihcaan misiteked u Mun-cya-la a tukay. nu tusa a bataan a pina, Ta-ka namakaydatu tu nikabulibulan nu taw, pasupacicien micuduh tu sakelecay a kawawan, Mun-cya-la masacacay misiteked, penecen nu hitay, malawpes nu nikalepacawan, atu culal sananay a nikala'cusa. . Ta-ka u Mun-cya-la a cen-ce lalangawan atu tatelungan nu sakaudip. atu yadahay nu sasaudipan a pulung. Ta-ka liwliw kacikian, sawni masu'd ku caculilan, yadah ku sakawawiesan nu caayay ka taneng a cacanan. ayda nu cacay a bataan nu pina, Ta-ka macunus tu nu tayniay nu i hekalay a tademaw. 50 . nikalekalan nina tukay i sabaw tu pitu a secian, malaMuo-wo-e-ti-kuo a niyadu'an atu tatelungan nu sapisiwbayan. malaMun-cya-la dawa a papacakayan, u In'-tu' mikilulay tu Ta-lu cacelakan nu tukayan. Ta-ka sakacelakan han i sabaw tu pitu atu sabaw tu walu a secian, tawya u O-Ya Ta-lu namakacuwaay nu misiwbayan a niyaduan. Mu-cya-e tademaw matineng misakapah tu papatidengan tu baluan, Cin-cen-se, kun-ten atu paw-lea malasakapahay a nisiludan nu tukayan. . inatukay nanipanganganan tu wali a Wi-ni-se. itida nu nikalimadan nu Ing-kuo ku mikuwanay, nina tukay idaw ku nipacumud tu dinki, silamalay, kacudu, sise tabakiay a cacudadan, atu cacudadan atu nu aydaay a nikasinanuman. caysiwseplim mihcaan, mala Mun-cya-la wali atu A-sa-mu-pan a tapang nu sin-cen atu kakiwyikuan nu tatelungan. Caysiwsippic mihcaan, mahedektu ku taydaay mikuwan, mala Tun-pa-ci-se-ta a sin-cen suotu. caysiwnemtu mihcaan mihapu u Pa-ci-se-ta a li-ha suo-tu. caysiwsippic mihcaan, malamisitekeday a Mun-cya-la kanatal a suo-tu. Mun-cya-la-kuo-sin-ha sakalima a selican mihapu Pu-ta-ka u kun-he-kuo suo-tu. . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ta-ka kitidaan satabalay idaw tu ku muenengay nu tademaw a tukayan taneng mikilim katukuh tu pituay a secian. ina kitidaan nanikuwanan nu Cia-muo-li-puo atu Pa-la kanatal ku mikuwanay, katukuh tu siwa a secian kuwanen nu In-tu ci Sen-na tawya ku mikuwanay. . saan ku katuuday u Pa-la-sen sabaw tusa a seci itida i ka-se-wa-li miyau. Ta-ka liklik a niyaduan icuwaay zitay hakiya a nikakenisan u " Mun-cya-la kakitidaan". nina tukay u "Lakshmi Bazar,Shankhari Bazar,Tanti Bazar,Patuatuli,Kumartuli,Bania Nagar atu Goal Nagar kapulungan nu tatelungan a sasiwbayan. nikuda ni Se-na wancew, Ta-ka kakilukilul satu a bahal han nu De-li-su-dan kanatal atu A-hu-han amikuwan, katukuh tu caynemsepwal mihcaan nikatayni ni Muo-wo-e. ".Ť©≤ŚüéÁĒĪLakshmi Bazar,Shankhari Bazar,Tanti Bazar,Patuatuli,Kumartuli,Bania NagarŚíĆGoal Nagar . lalangaw patideng tu luma'śĖáŚĆĖ ŚĽļÁĮČ Ta-ka idaw ku nisangaan i sabaw tu enem katukuh i sabaw tu siwa a seci u nisangaan tu luma' makaala tu tusa a malebut ku pina tu luma'. mahida La-e-pa-ke-paw, A-he'-sang-man-ci-le', Sing-cin-cen-se', Ca-ke'-cin-cen-se', Huo-say-ni-ta-lan, Ya-min-ni-ya kiwkay, Ta-ka-men, Ta-mun-di, Me-kuy-yen-kun, Ta-yi-cen, Siw-yi-cen, Ta-ke'-se-wa-li-se', S-wa-mi-pa-ke-sen miyu, Se-mu miyu, Ta-ma-la-ci-ka-fu-se', Sen-men-kuy kiwkay atu Puo-ke-se cacudadan. i malumanay nu Ta-ka a Ta-ka-sa-ta-e-cya-te', A-ma-ni-tu-la atu Fa-la-se-kan niyadu'an, yadah henay ku namabulaway a nisangaan tu luma'. Pi-na-de'-pi-pi-cin-cen-se' itida i Na-lin-ta niyadu'an, patideng i caysiplimsip mihcaan, Mun-cya-la-su-dan-ma-ha-maw-de. Sa-a pikuwanan, ninatukay ayda salumanay nu cinga nisangaan a luma'an. pikuwanan nu Ing-kuo idaw ku tada sangan nu mamelawan pasu malumanay a kutuhuing , Mun-cya-la-ten, Kuo-sun-ten atu Mi-te-hu padekuan. . misangaay tu luma' ci Lu-yi. Kan sakasenengan a aydaay nisangaan u Kuo-min-yi-huy-ten, mahida u Mun-cya-la a kitidaan atu liwan namaka babalakiay, itida i caysiwwaltu mihcaan i Ta-ka milaksisiki, malakitakid nu satabakiay a Lipuing nu lumaan, kitidaan makaala tu 800,000 m2. Ka-ma-la-pu-e silamalay u Amilika ci Luo-puo-ti'. Pu-si ku misikiay, u kasenengan a nisangaan. misitekeday a kakininga a adawan u ninatukay a baluhay nu paya a tatidengan, u sapikining ci Mun-cya-la pilepacawan nu likisian a kawaw tu nipatidengan. ,Ść†Śúį800,000 m2. . ciawyi śēôŤā≤ Ta-ka a cacudadan itida i Mun-cya-la u sayadahay, tabakiay a cacudadan makaala tu limtu a cacudadan, pasu salumanay nu cacudadan a tabakiay Ta-ka sye-yen " patideng i caywalsipcay mihcaan" u Ta-ka tabakiay a cacudadan " patideng i caysiwtucay mihcaan" satenesay nu sihu a tabakiay nu cacudadan. . #%E5%9C%B0%E7%90%86%E5%8F%8A%E6%B0%A3%E5%80%99
S.PHON: == ta-ka ** == ta-kaj " mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kamu: ****", u tukaj nu mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa, ta-ka nijadu Ē~ °an u tada tukaj. itida ku …ôn…ôŇč nu ta-ka i ńß…ôn-ńß…ô-san- ¶jw- ¶uo pu-r~…ĺi-kan- ¶ja sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu amisan, u satabakiaj nu mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa a tukaj, u nan-ja ma ¶ima ¶ian, tad…ômaw nu ma ¶ima ¶ian makaar~…ĺa tu ¶ajtus…ôps…ôp nu pinaaj a tad…ômawan. idaw ku kasiidaan nu r~…ĺikisi, paŇčaŇčan ńßan u " ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô Ē~ ° tukaj" masabina ¶adan ku nit…ônunan a tuudan nu kasiŇčaŇčanan. ** , . mar~…ĺumanaj nu ta-ka u ¶ja-ńßan- ¶i-…ô-na- ¶ja-…ô " mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kamu : ********* ***, ¶ajn…ôms…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan u muo-wuo-…ô-ti-kuo mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa nijadu Ē~ °an a ¶uŇč-tu ¶i su-p…ôi-ta. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan-ńßan patid…ôŇč, itida i sabaw tu pitu a s…ô ¶i u katakid a mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu sasiwbajan.sisa, ta-ka ajdaaj a nipatid…ôŇčan tat…ôŇčaaj i sabaw tu siwa a s…ô ¶ian nu iŇč-kuo kabur~…ĺawan a zitajan, tada mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ¶ja-…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-ta a mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa sakatusa a tukajan. ¶ajsiwsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan in-pa nikak…ônisan satu, ta-ka mar~…ĺa tuŇč-pa- ¶i-s…ô-tan a tada kanatar~…ĺan, itida i ¶ajsiwpi ¶tu mińß ¶aan misit…ôk…ôd u mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa a tukaj. nu tusa a bataan a pina, ta-ka namakajdatu tu nikabur~…ĺibur~…ĺan nu taw, pasupa ¶i ¶i…ôn mi ¶uduńß tu sak…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj a kawawan, mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa masa ¶a ¶aj misit…ôk…ôd, p…ôn…ô ¶…ôn nu ńßitaj, mar~…ĺawp…ôs nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, atu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ sananaj a nikar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usa. . ta-ka u mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu sakaudip. atu jadańßaj nu sasaudipan a pur~…ĺuŇč. ta-ka r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw ka ¶ikian, sawni masu Ē~ °d ku ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, jadańß ku sakawawi…ôsan nu ¶aajaj ka tan…ôŇč a ¶a ¶anan. ajda nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu pina, ta-ka ma ¶unus tu nu tajniaj nu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. ** . nikar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nina tukaj i sabaw tu pitu a s…ô ¶ian, mar~…ĺamuo-wo-…ô-ti-kuo a nijadu Ē~ °an atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu sapisiwbajan. mar~…ĺamun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa dawa a papa ¶akajan, u in Ē~ °-tu Ē~ ° mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj tu ta-r~…ĺu ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺakan nu tukajan. ta-ka saka ¶…ôr~…ĺakan ńßan i sabaw tu pitu atu sabaw tu war~…ĺu a s…ô ¶ian, tawja u o-ja ta-r~…ĺu namaka ¶uwaaj nu misiwbajan a nijaduan. mu- ¶ja-…ô tad…ômaw matin…ôŇč misakapańß tu papatid…ôŇčan tu bar~…ĺuan, ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô, kun-t…ôn atu paw-r~…ĺ…ôa mar~…ĺasakapańßaj a nisir~…ĺudan nu tukajan. . inatukaj nanipaŇčaŇčanan tu war~…ĺi a wi-ni-s…ô. itida nu nikar~…ĺimadan nu iŇč-kuo ku mikuwanaj, nina tukaj idaw ku nipa ¶umud tu dinki, sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, ka ¶udu, sis…ô tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan, atu ¶a ¶udadan atu nu ajdaaj a nikasinanuman. ¶ajsiws…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, mar~…ĺa mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa war~…ĺi atu a-sa-mu-pan a tapaŇč nu sin- ¶…ôn atu kakiwjikuan nu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan. ¶ajsiwsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan, mańß…ôd…ôktu ku tajdaaj mikuwan, mar~…ĺa tun-pa- ¶i-s…ô-ta a sin- ¶…ôn suotu. ¶ajsiwn…ômtu mińß ¶aan mińßapu u pa- ¶i-s…ô-ta a r~…ĺi-ńßa suo-tu. ¶ajsiwsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan, mar~…ĺamisit…ôk…ôdaj a mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa kanatar~…ĺ a suo-tu. mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kuo-sin-ńßa sakar~…ĺima a s…ôr~…ĺi ¶an mińßapu pu-ta-ka u kun-ńß…ô-kuo suo-tu. . r~…ĺikisi ** ta-ka kitidaan satabar~…ĺaj idaw tu ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw a tukajan tan…ôŇč mikir~…ĺim katukuńß tu pituaj a s…ô ¶ian. ina kitidaan nanikuwanan nu ¶ia-muo-r~…ĺi-puo atu pa-r~…ĺa kanatar~…ĺ ku mikuwanaj, katukuńß tu siwa a s…ô ¶ian kuwan…ôn nu in-tu ¶i s…ôn-na tawja ku mikuwanaj. . saan ku katuudaj u pa-r~…ĺa-s…ôn sabaw tusa a s…ô ¶i itida i ka-s…ô-wa-r~…ĺi mijau. ta-ka r~…ĺikr~…ĺik a nijaduan i ¶uwaaj zitaj ńßakija a nikak…ônisan u " mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa kakitidaan". nina tukaj u "r~…ĺaksńßmi bazar,sńßankńßari bazar,tanti bazar,patuatur~…ĺi,kumartur~…ĺi,bania nagar atu goar~…ĺ nagar kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan a sasiwbajan. nikuda ni s…ô-na wan ¶…ôw, ta-ka kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu a bańßar~…ĺ ńßan nu d…ô-r~…ĺi-su-dan kanatar~…ĺ atu a-ńßu-ńßan amikuwan, katukuńß tu ¶ajn…ôms…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan nikatajni ni muo-wo-…ô. ¶…ôn-s…ô Ē~ °, ¶a-k…ô Ē~ °- ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô Ē~ °, ńßuo-saj-ni-ta-r~…ĺan, ja-min-ni-ja kiwkaj, ta-ka-m…ôn, ta-mun-di, m…ô-kuj-j…ôn-kun, ta-ji- ¶…ôn, siw-ji- ¶…ôn, ta-k…ô Ē~ °-s…ô-wa-r~…ĺi-s…ô Ē~ °, s-wa-mi-pa-k…ô-s…ôn miju, s…ô-mu miju, ta-ma-r~…ĺa- ¶i-ka-fu-s…ô Ē~ °, s…ôn-m…ôn-kuj kiwkaj atu puo-k…ô-s…ô ¶a ¶udadan. i mar~…ĺumanaj nu ta-ka a ta-ka-sa-ta-…ô- ¶ja-t…ô Ē~ °, a-ma-ni-tu-r~…ĺa atu fa-r~…ĺa-s…ô-kan nijadu Ē~ °an, jadańß ńß…ônaj ku namabur~…ĺawaj a nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. pi-na-d…ô Ē~ °-pi-pi- ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô Ē~ ° itida i na-r~…ĺin-ta nijadu Ē~ °an, patid…ôŇč i ¶ajsipr~…ĺimsip mińß ¶aan, mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-su-dan-ma-ńßa-maw-d…ô. sa-a pikuwanan, ninatukaj ajda sar~…ĺumanaj nu ¶iŇča nisaŇčaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. pikuwanan nu iŇč-kuo idaw ku tada saŇčan nu mam…ôr~…ĺawan pasu mar~…ĺumanaj a kutuńßuiŇč , mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-t…ôn, kuo-sun-t…ôn atu mi-t…ô-ńßu pad…ôkuan. . misaŇčaaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶i r~…ĺu-ji. kan sakas…ôn…ôŇčan a ajdaaj nisaŇčaan u kuo-min-ji-ńßuj-t…ôn, mańßida u mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa a kitidaan atu r~…ĺiwan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj, itida i ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺtu mińß ¶aan i ta-ka mir~…ĺaksisiki, mar~…ĺakitakid nu satabakiaj a r~…ĺipuiŇč nu r~…ĺumaan, kitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu ***,*** m*. ka-ma-r~…ĺa-pu-…ô sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj u amir~…ĺika ¶i r~…ĺuo-puo-ti Ē~ °. pu-si ku misikiaj, u kas…ôn…ôŇčan a nisaŇčaan. misit…ôk…ôdaj a kakiniŇča a adawan u ninatukaj a bar~…ĺuńßaj nu paja a tatid…ôŇčan, u sapikiniŇč ¶i mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa pir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu r~…ĺikisian a kawaw tu nipatid…ôŇčan. ,*****,*** m*. . ¶iawji ** ta-ka a ¶a ¶udadan itida i mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa u sajadańßaj, tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺimtu a ¶a ¶udadan, pasu sar~…ĺumanaj nu ¶a ¶udadan a tabakiaj ta-ka sj…ô-j…ôn " patid…ôŇč i ¶ajwar~…ĺsip ¶aj mińß ¶aan" u ta-ka tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan " patid…ôŇč i ¶ajsiwtu ¶aj mińß ¶aan" sat…ôn…ôsaj nu sińßu a tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan. . #%…ô*%* ¶%b*%…ô*%**%**%…ô*%*f%*a%…ô*%b*%a*%…ô*%**%**
S.FORM: == Ta-ka ťĀĒŚć° == Ta-kay " Mun-cya-la-kamu: ŗ¶Ęŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ", u tukay nu Mun-cya-la, Ta-ka niyadu'an u tada tukay. itida ku eneng nu Ta-ka i Hen-he-san-cyw-cuo Pu-li-kan-cya sa'wac nu amisan, u satabakiay nu Mun-cya-la a tukay, u Nan-ya macimacian, tademaw nu macimacian makaala tu caytusepsep nu pinaay a tademawan. idaw ku kasiidaan nu likisi, pangangan han u "cin-cen-se' tukay" masabinacadan ku nitenunan a tuudan nu kasinganganan. ťĀĒŚć° , . malumanay nu Ta-ka u Cya-han-ci-e-na-cya-e " Mun-cya-la-kamu : ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶ôŗßćŗ¶óŗßÄŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗ¶óŗ¶į, caynemsepwal mihcaan u Muo-wuo-e-ti-kuo Mun-cya-la niyadu'an a cung-tu ci Su-pei-ta. Yi-se-lan-han patideng, itida i sabaw tu pitu a seci u katakid a Mu-se-lin tatelungan nu sasiwbayan.sisa, Ta-ka aydaay a nipatidengan tatengaay i sabaw tu siwa a secian nu Ing-kuo kabulawan a zitayan, tada mikilul tu Cya-e-ke'-ta a Mun-cya-la sakatusa a tukayan. caysiwsippic mihcaan In-pa nikakenisan satu, Ta-ka mala Tung-pa-ci-se-tan a tada kanatalan, itida i caysiwpictu mihcaan misiteked u Mun-cya-la a tukay. nu tusa a bataan a pina, Ta-ka namakaydatu tu nikabulibulan nu taw, pasupacicien micuduh tu sakelecay a kawawan, Mun-cya-la masacacay misiteked, penecen nu hitay, malawpes nu nikalepacawan, atu culal sananay a nikala'cusa. . Ta-ka u Mun-cya-la a cen-ce lalangawan atu tatelungan nu sakaudip. atu yadahay nu sasaudipan a pulung. Ta-ka liwliw kacikian, sawni masu'd ku caculilan, yadah ku sakawawiesan nu caayay ka taneng a cacanan. ayda nu cacay a bataan nu pina, Ta-ka macunus tu nu tayniay nu i hekalay a tademaw. 50 . nikalekalan nina tukay i sabaw tu pitu a secian, malaMuo-wo-e-ti-kuo a niyadu'an atu tatelungan nu sapisiwbayan. malaMun-cya-la dawa a papacakayan, u In'-tu' mikilulay tu Ta-lu cacelakan nu tukayan. Ta-ka sakacelakan han i sabaw tu pitu atu sabaw tu walu a secian, tawya u O-Ya Ta-lu namakacuwaay nu misiwbayan a niyaduan. Mu-cya-e tademaw matineng misakapah tu papatidengan tu baluan, Cin-cen-se, kun-ten atu paw-lea malasakapahay a nisiludan nu tukayan. . inatukay nanipanganganan tu wali a Wi-ni-se. itida nu nikalimadan nu Ing-kuo ku mikuwanay, nina tukay idaw ku nipacumud tu dinki, silamalay, kacudu, sise tabakiay a cacudadan, atu cacudadan atu nu aydaay a nikasinanuman. caysiwseplim mihcaan, mala Mun-cya-la wali atu A-sa-mu-pan a tapang nu sin-cen atu kakiwyikuan nu tatelungan. Caysiwsippic mihcaan, mahedektu ku taydaay mikuwan, mala Tun-pa-ci-se-ta a sin-cen suotu. caysiwnemtu mihcaan mihapu u Pa-ci-se-ta a li-ha suo-tu. caysiwsippic mihcaan, malamisitekeday a Mun-cya-la kanatal a suo-tu. Mun-cya-la-kuo-sin-ha sakalima a selican mihapu Pu-ta-ka u kun-he-kuo suo-tu. . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ta-ka kitidaan satabalay idaw tu ku muenengay nu tademaw a tukayan taneng mikilim katukuh tu pituay a secian. ina kitidaan nanikuwanan nu Cia-muo-li-puo atu Pa-la kanatal ku mikuwanay, katukuh tu siwa a secian kuwanen nu In-tu ci Sen-na tawya ku mikuwanay. . saan ku katuuday u Pa-la-sen sabaw tusa a seci itida i ka-se-wa-li miyau. Ta-ka liklik a niyaduan icuwaay zitay hakiya a nikakenisan u " Mun-cya-la kakitidaan". nina tukay u "Lakshmi Bazar,Shankhari Bazar,Tanti Bazar,Patuatuli,Kumartuli,Bania Nagar atu Goal Nagar kapulungan nu tatelungan a sasiwbayan. nikuda ni Se-na wancew, Ta-ka kakilukilul satu a bahal han nu De-li-su-dan kanatal atu A-hu-han amikuwan, katukuh tu caynemsepwal mihcaan nikatayni ni Muo-wo-e. ".Ť©≤ŚüéÁĒĪLakshmi Bazar,Shankhari Bazar,Tanti Bazar,Patuatuli,Kumartuli,Bania NagarŚíĆGoal Nagar . lalangaw patideng tu luma'śĖáŚĆĖ ŚĽļÁĮČ Ta-ka idaw ku nisangaan i sabaw tu enem katukuh i sabaw tu siwa a seci u nisangaan tu luma' makaala tu tusa a malebut ku pina tu luma'. mahida La-e-pa-ke-paw, A-he'-sang-man-ci-le', Sing-cin-cen-se', Ca-ke'-cin-cen-se', Huo-say-ni-ta-lan, Ya-min-ni-ya kiwkay, Ta-ka-men, Ta-mun-di, Me-kuy-yen-kun, Ta-yi-cen, Siw-yi-cen, Ta-ke'-se-wa-li-se', S-wa-mi-pa-ke-sen miyu, Se-mu miyu, Ta-ma-la-ci-ka-fu-se', Sen-men-kuy kiwkay atu Puo-ke-se cacudadan. i malumanay nu Ta-ka a Ta-ka-sa-ta-e-cya-te', A-ma-ni-tu-la atu Fa-la-se-kan niyadu'an, yadah henay ku namabulaway a nisangaan tu luma'. Pi-na-de'-pi-pi-cin-cen-se' itida i Na-lin-ta niyadu'an, patideng i caysiplimsip mihcaan, Mun-cya-la-su-dan-ma-ha-maw-de. Sa-a pikuwanan, ninatukay ayda salumanay nu cinga nisangaan a luma'an. pikuwanan nu Ing-kuo idaw ku tada sangan nu mamelawan pasu malumanay a kutuhuing , Mun-cya-la-ten, Kuo-sun-ten atu Mi-te-hu padekuan. . misangaay tu luma' ci Lu-yi. Kan sakasenengan a aydaay nisangaan u Kuo-min-yi-huy-ten, mahida u Mun-cya-la a kitidaan atu liwan namaka babalakiay, itida i caysiwwaltu mihcaan i Ta-ka milaksisiki, malakitakid nu satabakiay a Lipuing nu lumaan, kitidaan makaala tu 800,000 m2. Ka-ma-la-pu-e silamalay u Amilika ci Luo-puo-ti'. Pu-si ku misikiay, u kasenengan a nisangaan. misitekeday a kakininga a adawan u ninatukay a baluhay nu paya a tatidengan, u sapikining ci Mun-cya-la pilepacawan nu likisian a kawaw tu nipatidengan. ,Ść†Śúį800,000 m2. . ciawyi śēôŤā≤ Ta-ka a cacudadan itida i Mun-cya-la u sayadahay, tabakiay a cacudadan makaala tu limtu a cacudadan, pasu salumanay nu cacudadan a tabakiay Ta-ka sye-yen " patideng i caywalsipcay mihcaan" u Ta-ka tabakiay a cacudadan " patideng i caysiwtucay mihcaan" satenesay nu sihu a tabakiay nu cacudadan. . #%E5%9C%B0%E7%90%86%E5%8F%8A%E6%B0%A3%E5%80%99
